# libColorPicker

## Color Picker Library for iOS

A color picker library for iOS tweaks and applications. Used by many tweaks to allow users to customize colors.

## Features

- Multiple color picker modes
- HSB and RGB color models
- Preset colors
- Custom color input
- Used by many popular tweaks

## For Developers

This is a library package. Other tweaks can depend on this package to provide color picking functionality to users.

## Compatibility

- iOS 10.0 and later
- Required by many customization tweaks
